assessment.note: He names a specific avoided behavior — asking for sharper feedback earlier — which signals mild hesitation/underreach rather than a wellbeing issue.

new_queue.label: Sharper feedback
new_queue.name: What makes you wait to ask for sharper feedback?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific hesitation he named before moving on, to surface the driver behind the delay.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Question habit
new_queue.name: What stops you from asking more questions earlier?
new_queue.description: Gets at the behavior behind low question volume without assuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Next behavior
new_queue.name: What would you do differently on the next cross-team piece?
new_queue.description: Moves from diagnosis to one concrete behavior change in how he works across teams.
